description: Section 04 — experience. Click-to-expand list rows: 10rem date column · role + org · +/− toggle. Open row reveals body and dark mono bullet pills.

name: CV Experience

items.body: Lead backend + the new AI track. Turn static designs into data-driven apps, design REST APIs, optimize databases, and lately — wire MCP servers and agent workflows into the existing stack so the team actually uses them.
items.bullets:
60+ production sites
12 frontends
8 backend APIs
AI / MCP integration across the stack

items.body: Sysadmin, web dev and the person you call when nothing prints. Manufacturing IT.
Built the company site on a backend framework. Clean code, no shortcuts.
Java EE + GWT solution for an automotive industry client. Enterprise software.
